sharedStateObservations.description: EMAActivity uses gradient-based activity tracking with configurable decay
Tier classification uses strict inequality (>) for hot threshold, not (>=)
State serialization uses dict[str, Any] to handle mixed tensor/float types

salientSummary: EMAActivity tracker correctly implements EMA decay (VAL-ACT-001), tier classification (VAL-ACT-002), and state management. Comprehensive 91% test coverage validates all edge cases.
